title: Vejle, Southern Denmark — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vejle, Southern Denmark: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vejle is a city in Southern Denmark with a population of 58,000. A picturesque city at the head of Vejle Fjord, known for its iconic Wave building, shopping, and nature trails.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
